prompts.label: Go-To vs frank
prompts.query: Go-To Skincare vs frank body which is better
prompts.claudeResponse: Go-To Face Hero Oil is superior for barrier repair and hydration with kakadu plum, while Frank Body excels in coffee scrubs for exfoliation—they serve different purposes. Choose Go-To for daily skincare, Frank Body for occasional exfoliation treatments.

prompts.label: Go-To vs Sukin
prompts.query: Go-To Skincare vs Sukin skincare comparison
prompts.claudeResponse: Go-To offers premium, targeted products like Face Hero Oil with potent actives, while Sukin provides affordable, gentle daily essentials ideal for sensitive skin. Sukin is better for budget-conscious beginners; Go-To suits those seeking high-performance ingredients.
prompts.gptResponse: Go-To Skincare is known for its clean, simple formulations while Sukin offers affordable, natural ingredients; both are effective.

prompts.label: Go-To vs Sand
prompts.query: Go-To Skincare vs Sand & Sky products
prompts.claudeResponse: Go-To Face Hero Oil focuses on barrier repair and hydration, while Sand & Sky specialises in clay masks and treatment products for detox. Both are Australian brands; choose Go-To for oils and serums, Sand & Sky for intensive mask treatments.
prompts.gptResponse: Go-To Skincare focuses on day-to-day hydration, while Sand & Sky specializes in detoxifying and brightening.

prompts.label: face oils work

prompts.claudeResponse: Yes, face oils like squalane, jojoba, or Go-To Face Hero Oil effectively treat dry skin when applied over damp skin to lock in moisture. Layer oil over your moisturiser for maximum hydration benefits and barrier repair.

prompts.label: skin barrier repair
prompts.query: what causes damaged skin barrier and how to repair it
prompts.claudeResponse: Over-exfoliation, harsh cleansers, and too many actives damage the barrier—repair by using Go-To Face Hero Oil, CeraVe Moisturising Cream, and gentle cleansing for 2-4 weeks. Stop all exfoliation and actives until skin barrier fully restores.
prompts.gptResponse: Over-exfoliation, harsh products, and environmental stressors can damage the skin barrier; repair it with products like CeraVe Healing Ointment and hydrating serums.
